recommendations.title: Peppermint Soda
recommendations.overview: In the fall of 1963, Anne is becoming a teenager. She lives in Paris with her mother and her older sister, Frédérique. They're just back from summer at the beach with their father. School starts. A turbulent year awaits them both.

recommendations.title: Ladies
recommendations.overview: Lucie is in remission and her illness is almost a distant memory. Her family pushes her to live life to the fullest, and in doing so Lucie meets the charming and arrogant Clovis, who is immediately beguiled by her wit and humor. It is Dalila, however

recommendations.title: First Girl I Loved
recommendations.overview: Seventeen-year-old Anne just fell in love with Sasha, the most popular girl at her L.A. public high school. But when Anne tells her best friend, Clifton—who has always harbored a secret crush on her—he does his best to get in the way.

recommendations.title: Let Her Kill You

recommendations.title: Persuasion

recommendations.title: Finch
recommendations.overview: On a post-apocalyptic Earth, a robot, built to protect the life of his dying creator's beloved dog, learns about life, love, friendship, and what it means to be human.

recommendations.title: Jealous
recommendations.overview: A divorced teacher suddenly becomes jealous of everyone, including her daughter, friends and neighbors.

recommendations.title: The New Kids
recommendations.overview: A brother and his young sister come to a small town to find out a local gang terrorizes the population.
